mapper.select: SELECT TO_CHAR(add_datetime, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS activity_date, COUNT(*) AS count FROM learning_log WHERE creator = #{userId} AND add_datetime BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY TO_CHAR(add_datetime, 'YYYY-MM-DD')

SELECT TO_CHAR(add_datetime, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS activity_date, COUNT(*) AS count FROM learning_notes WHERE creator = #{userId} AND add_datetime BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY TO_CHAR(add_datetime, 'YYYY-MM-DD')

SELECT TO_CHAR(add_datetime, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS activity_date, COUNT(*) AS count FROM teaching_question_bank-- 假设您的答题记录表是这个名字 WHERE creator = #{userId} AND add_datetime BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY TO_CHAR(add_datetime, 'YYYY-MM-DD')

WITH UserLogsWithPrevious AS ( -- 步骤1: 使用LAG窗口函数获取当前用户日志的上一条记录信息 SELECT textbook_id, add_datetime, -- 按用户分区(creator)，再按时间排序，确保获取的是同一个用户的上一条记录 LAG(textbook_id, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY creator ORDER BY add_datetime) AS prev_textbook_id, LAG(add_datetime, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY creator ORDER BY add_datetime) AS prev_add_datetime FROM learning_log WHERE creator = #{userId} ) -- 步骤2: 筛选出符合新学习开始条件的记录并计数 SELECT COUNT(*) FROM UserLogsWithPrevious WHERE textbook_id = #{textbookId} AND ( prev_add_datetime IS NULL OR -- 该用户的第一条记录 prev_textbook_id != textbook_id OR -- 上一条是别的教材 -- 分别提取Epoch秒数再相减，以避免Kingbase中(timestamp-timestamp)返回bigint的问题 (EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM add_datetime) - EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM prev_add_datetime)) > 60 )
